case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ORLANDO G. WILLIAMS AKA ORLANDO WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
